name: C-10 --dry-run computes the bundle without writing the --emit path per §2.14
command: printf '%s' '{"bomFormat":"CycloneDX","specVersion":"1.6","components":[]}' > a.json && rm -f p.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --section aibom --emit p.json --aibom-file a.json --commit-sha abc --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -f p.json ] && echo skipped 1>&2
